TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-pear_panay

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a tamdaw ira ku penaluma’ nira tu ccay a kilang tu cihaciay tu enem u nasi.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人他種了一棵樹，長出六顆梨子的樹。
There was a person planting a tree, which bore six pears.

S.FORM: mipitpit cingra tu nasi nira.
S.TRANSL: 他去摘梨子。
He plucked pears.

S.FORM: mikalic cingra i fafa’ed tata’ang tu kuya kilang nira.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上去，那棵樹長得很大棵。
He climbed up. The tree grew tall.

S.FORM: mikalic cingra i fafa’ed pakawal han nira a mi kalic.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上去（的時候），用樓梯爬上去。
He climbed up. He climbed up with a ladder.

S.FORM: adihay tu kuya ni pitpitan nira.
S.TRANSL: 他摘的果實多了。
What he plucked were numerous.

S.FORM: ma‘pud cingra miteli tulu ku langa nira i la’enu.
S.TRANSL: 他下來了，要放置在下面的三個籃子。
He went down to put (the pears) in the three baskets below.

S.FORM: matumus tu ku tusa a langa.
S.TRANSL: 兩個籃子都裝滿了。
Two baskets were full.

S.FORM: miliyaw haca cingra a mikalic mipitpit i fafa’ed ku.
S.TRANSL: 他再次爬上去，在上面摘。
He climbed up again to pluck (fruit) up there.

S.FORM: takaraw kura kilang i fafa’ed cingra a mikalic.
S.TRANSL: 那棵樹很高，他爬到上面。
The tree was tall, and he climbed up.

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a tamdaw mi kitingay tu siri.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人牽著山羊。
There was a person who pulled a goat along.

S.FORM: tayra a mi ra’ud nengnenghan nira u nasi kuya mipitpitan patiku’.
S.TRANSL: 他靠近然後看了，（原來是）摘下來的梨子，就放了回去。
He went and approached, seeing the plucked pears. He put them back.

S.FORM: huni ira ku ccay a wawa tu nikiliciway mitafsiw itira.
S.TRANSL: 一會兒，有一個小孩騎著單車，從那裡經過。
After a while, there was a child who rode a bike and passed by.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira ira i fafa’ed kuya tamdaw mipitpit.
S.TRANSL: 他一看，那個人在上面摘（水果）。
He saw a person plucking (fruit) above.

S.FORM: ca’ahan nira mica’a ca’ay pinengneng pasila’enu kuya tamdaw.
S.TRANSL: 他抬頭仰望，那個（摘果樹的）人都不往下看。
He raised his head, and (saw) that person (the person who was plucking fruit) did not look down.

S.FORM: ya mikuliciway sa tu a wawa nengnenghan nira kuya nasi itira i langa.
S.TRANSL: 而後，騎著腳踏車的小孩，他看著在籃子裡的梨子。
The child that rode a bike looked at the pears in the baskets.

S.FORM: alahan nira miala ku ccay a langa pakalic itira i kuliciw nira.
S.TRANSL: 他拿走了一籃裝上他的腳踏車。
He took one basket and put it on his bike.

S.FORM: ca’ay kanengneng nuya tamdaw tuya mikalicay.
S.TRANSL: 爬到上面的人沒有看到。
The person who climbed up did not see this.

S.FORM: samaanen i fafa’ed cingra a mipitpit.
S.TRANSL: 那有什麼辦法呢，（因為）他在上面摘嘛。
He couldn’t do anything. He was plucking (fruit) above.

S.FORM: alahan nuya wawa tu fa’inayan nikuliciway ku ccay a langa.
S.TRANSL: 那個騎單車的男孩拿走了一籃。
The boy who rode a bike took one basket.

S.FORM: kuliciw sa tu cingra mi nukay.
S.TRANSL: 他就騎著單車回家。
He rode his bike home.

S.FORM: tahira i ra’ay ira masalitemuk nira ku ccay a fafahiyan a mikuliciway.
S.TRANSL: 不遠處和他一位騎著腳踏車的女孩子交會了。
Somewhere not far away, he met one girl who rode a bike.

S.FORM: malalitemuk cangra mafiyuk nu fali nu kalalitemuk nira ku kafung nuya wawa tiya fa’inayan.
S.TRANSL: 他們交會的時候，忽然一陣風把那個男孩的帽子吹走了。
When they met, the wind blew the boy’s hat away.

S.FORM: matefad ku kafung nira.
S.TRANSL: 他的帽子掉下來。
His hat fell.

S.FORM: tala dadama cingra tu kafung nira tu sakatefadaw nuya kafung nira haw.
S.TRANSL: 帽子就快要掉下來了，所以他扶住他的帽子。
His hat was going to fall down soon, so he grasped it.

S.FORM: paci’ci sa’an matefad kiya kafung nira.
S.TRANSL: 如此努力，帽子（還是）掉下來。
Even though he tried hard, his hat still fell down.

S.FORM: ca’ay tu pina’on cingra minengneng tu aayaw.
S.TRANSL: 他不能注意看著前方。
He could not look at the front attentively.

S.FORM: ira ku fekeloh i aayaw tahastul sa tu kuya kuliciw nira tuya fekeloh.
S.TRANSL: 前面有一塊石頭，腳踏車撞上那顆石頭。
There was a stone in the front, and the bike hit the stone.

S.FORM: pulin sa’an a mapulin kuya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩突然跌倒。
The child fell down.

S.FORM: ta adada ku wa’ay nira.
S.TRANSL: 他的腳很痛。
His foot hurt.

S.FORM: laklak sa tu kuya nasi tiya langa matapulung tuni kapulin nira.
S.TRANSL: 在他摔倒的時候，籃子裡的梨子全部傾倒散落滿地。
The pears in the basket were scattered all over when he fell down.

S.FORM: misapuhpuhpuh tuya wa’ay nira.
S.TRANSL: 他撫摸他的腳。
He stroked his foot.

S.FORM: ca’ay tu pakaluwad kuya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩無法爬起身來。
The child could not get up.

S.FORM: honi ira ku tatulu a sakalecad tunira a wawa tatulu ra’udhan nuya tatuluay.
S.TRANSL: 沒多久，有三個跟他一樣大的小孩，那三個人靠近他。
After a while, there were three children who were as old as he. The three approached him.

S.FORM: u ta tayra mitafsiw tuya mipitpitay kuya tatuluay a wawa mitatuy tu mali.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩將經過摘水果的，他們拿著球。
The three children passed the person who plucked fruit and they carried balls.

S.FORM: padanghan nira mipadang mipudpud tuya nasi miparu itira i langa.
S.TRANSL: 他幫忙撿梨子，裝在籃子裡。
He helped pick up the pears and put them in the basket.

S.FORM: ta lumuwad tu kuya mapulinay a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那個跌倒的小孩起來了。
The child who fell down got up.

S.FORM: ta patadu han nuya tatuluay a mipakalic itira i kuliciw nira.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人協助他放到他的腳踏車上。
The three helped him put (the pears) onto his bike.

S.FORM: ta milaliw tu kuya wawa a minukay.
S.TRANSL: 之後，那個小孩就離開回家了。
Then, the child left and went home.

S.FORM: ya tatuluay sa tu tayra tu i katayraan nira.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人呢，要去他們的目的地。
The three went towards their destination.

S.FORM: mitafsiw turira lalan tuya pipitpitan nuya tamdaw tu nasi.
S.TRANSL: 經過那條路，那個人在摘梨子的那一條路。
They went past the road where the person was plucking pears.

S.FORM: ma‘pud kuya mipitpitay tu nasi.
S.TRANSL: 摘水果的人下來。
The person who was plucking pears went down.

S.FORM: nengenghan nira ccay tu kuya matumusay a langa tu nasi awa ho ku paru niya ccay.
S.TRANSL: 他看，只有一個籃子裝滿梨子，一個籃子沒有裝。
He saw only one basket was filled with pears, and one basket was not full.

S.FORM: icuwa sa tu kuya ccay sa’an cingra a misaharaterateng.
S.TRANSL: 一個籃子到哪去了呢？他不斷的想。
Where was one basket? He kept thinking.

S.FORM: ira kiya mitafsiway tiya tatuluay nengnenghan nira awa ku ma’an nuya tatuluay.
S.TRANSL: 路過的那三個人，他一看，沒有什麼（特別的）。
He found the three people who passed nothing (special).

S.FORM: u mali mitatuyan nangra tafsiw sa’an kiya tatuluay.
S.TRANSL: 他們三個（只）拿著球經過。
They passed, carrying balls.

S.FORM: sa ‘inga’ingaing sa tu misaingiingir kuya tamdaw a minengneng tuya nika awa nu ccay a langa nuya mipitpitan nira a nasi.
S.TRANSL: 那個人搖頭，歪著頭，看著沒有裝梨子的籃子。
That person shook his head. His head was lopsided, looking at the basket which not was filled with pears.
